description: Healthcare analytics agent for Healthcare demo. Answers questions about preventable readmissions, claim denials, medication adherence, social determinants of health, provider performance, and prescription costs. Queries 13 curated gold-layer tables covering patients, encounters, claims, diagnoses, medications, payers, providers, and SDOH data. Supports both aggregated KPIs (readmission rate, denial rate, adherence rate) and patient-level detail lookups.
